title: Judge Essential 15cm/6" Cooks Knife - Razor Sharp Stainless Steel Blade, Dishwasher Safe, Ergonomic Handle, Easy to Sharpen
features: VERSATILE AND DURABLE COOKS KNIFE - the Judge Essential Cooks Knife is ready to handle whatever's on your chopping board, from chopping veggies to slicing meat, or tackling herbs
ERGONOMIC HANDLE - the multi-tactile handle offers a comfortable and secure grip for full control that feels secure and comfortable, even with wet hands
RAZOR SHARP STAINLESS STEEL BLADE - as you would expect from a Judge knife, it is made from high quality stainless steel, that does not rust or corrode and is durable for many years of use
EDGE GROUND TO EXACTING STANDARDS - the hardened steel is ground to a V-shape to give you a razor sharp edge that is very easy to sharpen for superb performance every day
DISHWASHER SAFE FOR EASY CLEANING - quick and easy to clean after each use, simply hand wash and dry, alternatively our Judge knives are dishwasher safe for convienience.
description: Product Description JUDGE ESSENTIAL KNIFE RANGE ABOUT JUDGE ESSENTIALS For over a century Judge has been a reliable ally in the kitchen. The brand is known all over the world for it's high quality and impressive performance. The Judge Essentials Knife Range has been designed to equip your kitchen with the fundamental tools for effortless food preparation. For the keen cook on a budget, the Judge Essentials Knife collection can do it all! JUDGE ESSENTIAL KNIVES KEY FEATURES Razor-Sharp Stainless Steel Blades – Expertly honed for effortless slicing, dicing, and chopping. Ergonomic Multi-Tactile Handles – Ensuring a comfortable, secure grip for precision control. Easy to Sharpen – Maintain peak performance with minimal effort. Dishwasher Safe – Hassle-free cleaning for everyday use. ERGONOMIC MULTI-TACTILE HANDLES The specially designed ergonomic handles provide a comfortable, secure grip for controlled slicing and dicing with minimal pressure. RAZOR-SHARP STAINLESS STEEL BLADES The stainless steel blades are designed to deliver clean, precise slices through any kitchen ingredient. It's easy to maintain the sharp edges with minimal effort for long-lasting performance. A GREAT GIFT FOR A KEEN NOVICE CHEF Designed for the keen cook on a budget, Judge Essentials knives offer the perfect blend of functionality and style, ensuring you have the right knife for every task.
